free_text: Preequilibrium Analysis of (P,N) Spectra on Various
Targets at Proton Energies of 25 to 45 MeV.
.A 7.0 Cm Diameter by 3.3 Cm Thick Ne213
Scintillator Coupled to an Rca 8575 Photomultiplier
The Angles from 0 Upto 160 Degrees with Step 5 Degrees.
The 20% Error Estimate Also Includes 10% Uncertainties
In the Neutron Detection Efficiencies Calculated with
A Modified Version of Kurz' Code and 5% Contributions
From the Measurements of Target Thickness and the
Calculations of Neutron Attenuation Along the Flight
- By Compiler - The Size of Published Figures is Very
Small.  Experimental Points Could not be Distinguished.
Therefore Compiler Read Data from Smooth Curves.
